title: PRIMARY CARE - 211info
text: TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC PRIMARY CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community health center providing comprehensive primary health care, covering neonatal, pediatric, adult, and geriatric services. Specific services include prenatal care, preventive services, immunizations, EKGs and other diagnostics, minor surgery, diabetes screenings, gynecological services, contraception, laboratory services, prescriptions and medication assistance, dental screenings, mental health evaluations, screenings for sexually transmitted infections, and referrals to specialty treatment. In addition, the Homeless Health Care Clinic provides acute primary care for homeless individuals. 180 Atwater Street N Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Low-income residents Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-7526 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake appointment to be admitted as a new patient. After the intake appointment, an appointment with a doctor will be arranged. FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan (Medicaid), Medicare, Tricare, most private insurance. Offers a sliding fee scale based on income and family size, for those without insurance and those with minimal insurance coverage. No one is turned away for an inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Call for list of documents needed for intake and first doctor appointments LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: One block north of Main Street. Three blocks east of Highway 99. Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Contraception Dental Screening General Laboratory Tests General Medical Care General Physical Examinations Medication Information/Management Mental Health Evaluation Pediatrics Prenatal Care Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Specialized Medical Tests Vaccine Information Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH AND CONNECTION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC
